title: Dental Care Referrals * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Dental Care Referrals * AIDS/HIV 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Older Adults AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00am-5pm Email (541) 322-7155 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides HIV testing, expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Harm Reduction works to meet people where they are at and to reduce the negative effects of drug use and sexual behaviors. Services offered include: rapid HIV testing, rapid Hepatitis C testing, syringe exchange services, distribution of condoms and first aid supplies, and Naloxone distribution. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies, by appointment only Email (541) 265-0404 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM
